这些表达式都不支持
- [x] date_part
- [x] datepart
- [x] extract
- [x] from_unixtime
- [x] abs
- [x] atan2
- [x] ceil
- [x] ceiling
- [x] floor
- [x] negative
- [x] unhex
- [x] rand
- [x] randn
- [x] ascii
- [x] bit_length
- [x] chr
- [x] concat_ws
- [x] contains
- [x] endswith
- [x] instr
- [x] repeat
- [x] replace
- [x] startswith
- [x] translate
